main.title: // Bot Settings
main.languageHint: Use the language menu below to update your preferred bot language.
main.privacyHint: Open Privacy Settings to manage what other users can see.
main.comingSoon: -# More settings options will be added in future updates.
main.noAccountFooter: Link an account with /accounts to enable privacy and language saving.

privacy.title: // Privacy Settings
privacy.description: Configure what data is visible to other users.
privacy.uidDesc: > Hide your UID from showing up anywhere
privacy.wishHistoryDesc: > Hide your Headhunting history from showing up anywhere
privacy.statsDesc: > Hide your Endfield Stats progression from showing up
privacy.leaderboardDesc: > Hide your profile from public leaderboards
privacy.showcaseDesc: > Hide your character showcase from other users
privacy.noAccountFooter: Link an account with /accounts to save privacy preferences.

errors.ownerOnly: You can only use your own settings menu.
